metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins, skills, and agents.

plugins.name: delivery
plugins.description: Linear-driven planning→QA flow: turn a conversation into a PRD (/to-prd), slice it into issues (/to-issues), grill plans against your docs (/grill-with-docs), generate design mockups (/plan-design), draft a test plan (/plan-qa), and QA changes against the ticket (/qa).

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Writing toolkit: humanize AI-sounding prose (/writing:human) and a storytelling coach for pitches, talks, and memos. Bundles the human-voice-writer and storyteller-guidance skills.

plugins.name: track
plugins.description: Console-native billable hours tracker. Slash commands (/track:start, /track:stop, /track:pause, /track:resume, /track:status, /track:report) record billable sessions to a git-versioned plaintext ledger under ~/.time-tracker/.

plugins.name: meta
plugins.description: Skills that improve other skills — session reflection (/skill-reflect) and HITL-gated SKILL.md evolution (/skill-improve).

plugins.name: dba
plugins.description: Postgres-first DBA playbooks: run a full health audit, design + implement schema with tests, clean up unused indexes and bloat, fix slow queries, and investigate live DB incidents (/dba) — discovering each project's migration/test/deploy conventions at runtime. Defers rule-level detail to supabase-postgres-best-practices when present.
